testcase.name: @BeforeClass setup
testcase.failure: org.openqa.selenium.SessionNotCreatedException: Could not start a new session. Response code 500. Message: session not created: Chrome instance exited. Examine ChromeDriver verbose log to determine the cause. Host info: host: 'DESKTOP-84ANS7K', ip: '192.168.1.40' Build info: version: '4.45.0', revision: 'cd6a3cd cd6a3cdfca6970f62e5bc8344109d0fe0e2af05e' System info: os.name: 'Windows 10', os.arch: 'amd64', os.version: '10.0', java.version: '21.0.7' Driver info: org.openqa.selenium.chrome.ChromeDriver Command: [null, newSession {capabilities=[Capabilities {browserName: chrome, goog:chromeOptions: {args: [--user-data-dir=C:\Users\hp..., --profile-directory=Default, --start-maximized], binary: C:\Program Files\Google\Chr..., extensions: []}}]}] Capabilities {browserName: chrome, goog:chromeOptions: {args: [--user-data-dir=C:\Users\hp..., --profile-directory=Default, --start-maximized], binary: C:\Program Files\Google\Chr..., extensions: []}} at org.openqa.selenium.remote.ProtocolHandshake.createSession(ProtocolHandshake.java:115) at org.openqa.selenium.remote.ProtocolHandshake.createSession(ProtocolHandshake.java:76) at org.openqa.selenium.remote.ProtocolHandshake.createSession(ProtocolHandshake.java:62) at org.openqa.selenium.remote.HttpCommandExecutor.execute(HttpCommandExecutor.java:171) at org.openqa.selenium.remote.service.DriverCommandExecutor.invokeExecute(DriverCommandExecutor.java:217) at org.openqa.selenium.remote.service.DriverCommandExecutor.execute(DriverCommandExecutor.java:175) at org.openqa.selenium.remote.RemoteWebDriver.execute(RemoteWebDriver.java:575) at org.openqa.selenium.remote.RemoteWebDriver.startSession(RemoteWebDriver.java:259) at org.openqa.selenium.remote.RemoteWebDriver.<init>(RemoteWebDriver.java:204) at org.openqa.selenium.chromium.ChromiumDriver.<init>(ChromiumDriver.java:114) at org.openqa.selenium.chrome.ChromeDriver.<init>(ChromeDriver.java:92) at org.openqa.selenium.chrome.ChromeDriver.<init>(ChromeDriver.java:76) at org.openqa.selenium.chrome.ChromeDriver.<init>(ChromeDriver.java:72) at testBase.BaseClass.setup(BaseClass.java:31) at java.base/java.util.ArrayList.forEach(ArrayList.java:1596) ... Removed 23 stack frames

testcase.name: @BeforeClass setup
testcase.failure: org.openqa.selenium.SessionNotCreatedException: Could not start a new session. Response code 500. Message: session not created: Chrome instance exited.
